prompt: In an initialized writable project, continue the user's explicit Grill. One material conclusion is settled: C8 may continue as a compression candidate. A distinct comparison remains open before the next action: whether spatial regions and channel interactions support the physical interpretation. There is no handoff and no second settled choice yet.
must: execute the supporting discussion-record transaction in the same turn before asking or replying
preserve the conclusion, its observed basis, the open comparison, and the exact continuation point
use Goal, Settled, Still open, Key evidence, and Continue here so a researcher can resume without a transcript
must_not: wait for a second settled choice when one conclusion already determines the open next check
reply with a plan or status such as ‘I will save the discussion record’ instead of writing it
persist because of time, word count, or a merely short Grill
treat the discussion record as execution authority or a process log
claim this offline authored case proves live model behavior
evidence: Offline static contract for the single-conclusion continuity trigger; it does not prove live model behavior.
